name: MetaGer
description: A non-profit metasearch engine combining results from multiple sources, powered by green energy.
longDescription: MetaGer, started in 1996 in Hanover, Germany, is a veteran metasearch engine operated by the non-profit SUMA-EV. It aggregates results from various sources while prioritizing user privacy, avoiding tracking, and running on renewable energy. Open-source and transparent, MetaGer appeals to privacy advocates and eco-conscious users, offering a sustainable, community-driven alternative to commercial search engines.
